messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

A vulnerability, which was classified as problematic, was found in earclink ESPCMS P8.21120101. Affected is an unknown function of the component Content Handler. The manipulation leads to cross site scripting. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. VDB-218154 is the identifier assigned to this vulnerability.

A vulnerability classified as problematic has been identified in earclink ESPCMS version P8.21120101. The issue exists within an unspecified function of the Content Handler component, leading to cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities. This flaw can be exploited remotely, and details of the exploit are publicly available. The vulnerability is cataloged as VDB-218154.
